Defines haptic feedback patterns with parameters for duration, strength, and repeat delay.

# Purpose
This JSON configuration file defines settings for haptic feedback. It specifies a haptic note with an ID of `strong_pulse`, which has a vibration duration of 50 milliseconds, a brake duration of 30 milliseconds, and a strength level of 100. The `pattern` array includes the `strong_pulse` note, and the `repeat_delay_ms` is set to 1000 milliseconds, indicating the delay between repetitions of the haptic pattern.
